description: Detects unused imports and unreachable code in TypeScript. Simplified from Rust: flags import_statement nodes (potential unused imports) and return/throw/break/continue statements (potential unreachable code follows). Cannot perform cross-file usage analysis or detect actual unreachable statements. Language scoped to typescript only.

flag.message: import statement or early-exit statement detected -- verify imports are used and no code is unreachable after return/throw
